settings.subtitle: Account & preferences
settings.botLead: Connect your Telegram bot. Saving applies the token and registers the webhook automatically — no .env or curl needed.
settings.botPublicUrlHint: Where this server is reachable from the internet (your domain, or an ngrok URL for local dev).
settings.botSecretHint: Validates that incoming updates are from Telegram. Generate one or set your own.
settings.botSetupTitle: How to set up your bot
settings.botStep1: In Telegram, open @BotFather → /newbot → follow the steps → copy the bot token.
settings.botStep2: Public URL: your domain in production, or run ngrok (e.g. ngrok http 5002) for local dev and paste the https URL.
settings.botStep3: Tap Generate for a webhook secret (or type your own).
settings.botStep4: Tap Save & connect — the bot is linked and the webhook is registered. You should see 'Connected as @yourbot'.
settings.loyaltyLead: Reward customers with points on completed orders, redeemable as a discount.
settings.loyaltyEnabledHint: Earn & redeem points across the bot and dashboard.
settings.loyaltyEarnHint: Points granted for each spend unit below.
settings.loyaltyPerAmountHint: e.g. 1000 → earn the points above for every 1,000 Ks of subtotal. Awarded when delivered.
settings.loyaltyRedeemValueHint: How many Ks each point is worth on redemption.
settings.loyaltyMinRedeemHint: Customers can redeem only once they reach this balance.
settings.companyLead: Your store's details — shown to customers and used on orders and receipts.
settings.companyWebsiteHint: Your website or social page link.
settings.ownerChatIdHint: Receives a Telegram alert on every new order and low-stock product.
settings.ownerChatIdSetupTitle: How to get your chat ID
settings.ownerChatIdStep1: In Telegram, open @userinfobot and tap Start.
settings.ownerChatIdStep2: It replies with your numeric ID (e.g. 123456789) — paste it above.
settings.ownerChatIdStep3: Open your shop's bot and tap Start once, so it can message you.
settings.voucherLead: Design your invoice / voucher. Every block is a toggle — the preview updates live.
settings.vPaperSizeHint: A4 / A5 for printers, 80mm / 58mm for thermal receipts.
settings.vAccentHint: Used for the title, logo and totals.
settings.vFooterNoteHint: A thank-you message or terms at the bottom.
settings.profileLead: Your name and contact information shown across the system.
settings.preferencesLead: Appearance and layout. Changes apply immediately.
settings.securityLead: Password and sign-in security for your account.
settings.fullNameHint: Shown in the top bar and audit logs.
settings.emailHint: Used for notifications and password recovery.
settings.navigationLayoutHint: Sidebar on the left or menu bar across the top.
settings.twoFactorHint: Extra sign-in protection with an authenticator app.
